message:
fix(services): timer cleanup and delta chain protection

checkpoint-compaction.service.ts:
- Add .unref() to scheduled interval timer and initial timeout
  to allow graceful process exit without waiting for timers
- Add delta chain protection to deleteExpiredCheckpoints:
  - Query for parentCheckpointId references before deletion
  - Filter candidates to exclude checkpoints that are parents
  - Prevents corrupting delta chains during compaction
  - Log when all candidates are skipped due to being parents

conflict-resolution.service.ts:
- Minor update (formatting/comments)

git-sync.service.ts:
- Minor update (formatting/comments)

supervisor.service.ts:
- Minor update (formatting/comments)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
